forum.prompt: Project Telos eleventh-wave: narrow all hard-problem research into a primary Navier-Stokes proof-packet program, preserve sidecar candidate lanes as backlog, build a publishable proof-carrying PDE subclaim path with Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, Telos, Learn, BuildLang/buildc, and strict no-grand-solution boundaries.

boundary: Forum routing chooses a Telos work lane; it is not a scientific endorsement.
Index context verifies a local source context envelope; it is not a proof of the Navier-Stokes target.
The eleventh-wave package selects a focused grand-problem program but keeps the grand theorem UNVERIFIABLE.
